author: doll-agent
content: Add tests/oracle_f32.rs mirroring oracle.rs across 16 ops (det, trace, inv, cholesky, matmul, dot, inner, outer, kron, vdot, norm, solve, matrix_rank, eigh, svd, qr). Add helpers to ferray-test-oracle: assert_f32_slice_ulp, should_skip_f32, make_f32_array_from_any. Cast f64 fixtures down to f32; ULP tolerance 4096 to absorb f32 precision gap.
